title: Holi Theme Overlay for Today

requirements.text: Add a 'Happy Holi' greeting banner or splash overlay that appears at the very top of the page (or as a brief dismissible overlay before the main content) displaying 'Happy Holi 🎨' in bold gold typography on a black background, visible only on the date of Holi (March 14, 2025). The component should auto-dismiss or be dismissible by the user.
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Happy Holi 🎨' greeting is visible at the top of the page or as an overlay when first landing on the site on March 14, 2025
The greeting uses gold text on a black background
The banner/overlay is not shown on any other date
The greeting is dismissible or auto-fades after a few seconds

requirements.text: Apply a Holi-themed color accent layer to the website for today only (March 14, 2025): overlay scattered, semi-transparent splashes of vibrant Holi colors (pink, red, green, cyan, orange, yellow) as decorative elements in the background or as floating blobs/powder-burst shapes across sections. These should complement — not override — the existing black and gold design system, appearing as subtle festive accents (e.g., behind hero text, at section dividers, or as corner decorations).

quotes: add some holi colours to the website

acceptanceCriteria: Colorful Holi-themed decorative elements (pink, red, green, cyan, orange, yellow) are visible on the page on March 14, 2025
The existing black and gold design tokens are preserved and remain dominant
Holi color accents do not appear on any date other than March 14, 2025
Decorative splashes/blobs are semi-transparent and do not obscure primary content or CTAs

requirements.text: Implement a date-gating utility (e.g., `isHoliToday()` returning true only when the current date is March 14, 2025) and use it consistently to conditionally render all Holi-themed components (the greeting banner and color accents) so they are automatically hidden on all other dates without any manual toggle.
acceptanceCriteria: A utility function or constant checks if today is March 14, 2025
All Holi-themed UI elements (banner, color splashes) are wrapped in a conditional that uses this check
On any date other than March 14, 2025, the website renders exactly as before with no Holi elements visible

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
The existing black and gold design tokens in frontend/src/index.css and frontend/tailwind.config.js must remain unchanged
All Holi UI elements must be strictly date-gated to March 14, 2025 only
nonGoals: Permanently changing the site's color scheme or design tokens
Adding a user-facing toggle to enable/disable the Holi theme

required: Vibrant Holi color powder splash burst illustration with pink, red, green, cyan, orange, and yellow powder clouds on a transparent background (holi-splash.dim_800x400.png)
